memoryLane.name: Phase 12: Extend Light/Dark Theme Polish to Remaining Sections
memoryLane.focus: THEME POLISH ONLY — No performance work in this phase
scope: Apply light/dark theme consistency to Services page components
Apply light/dark theme consistency to Projects page components
Apply light/dark theme consistency to About page components
Apply light/dark theme consistency to News Hub components
Apply light/dark theme consistency to Contact page components
Verify all section backgrounds, buttons, text, and borders follow color strategy
Update Cypress baselines for all polished sections
reference_components: Phase 11 completed: Hero sections, navbar, breadcrumb, category buttons
Use these as template for remaining page sections

test_coverage.target: All pages visually consistent light/dark theme ✅

commits_created: 913391f - feat: Apply light/dark theme polish to Services, Contact, and News Hub sections

handoff_protocol.on_every_commit: Update this memory lane with: work completed, learnings discovered, current state, next tasks
handoff_protocol.on_main_merge: Add session observations to Docker electrical-website-state entity
handoff_protocol.example: After each commit: 'Completed: Services page styling. Learned: Grid layout resets on light theme. Next: Projects page'

learnings: Light/dark theme consistency requires explicit color pairs for ALL interactive elements
Borders need both light (border-foreground/20-50) and dark (dark:border-electric-cyan) variants
Text elements must have light mode default + dark: override to avoid dark-only values
Hover states critical on both themes - light green (hsl(174 100% 35%)) vs dark cyan
Pattern proved from Phase 11 (about-hero.tsx) applies consistently across all sections
memoryLane.next_phase: Phase 13: Lighthouse Optimization - Performance metrics, Core Web Vitals, bundle analysis
